overview: An admin-only fee management system for educational institutions. Admins define fee structures, enroll students, record payments, track collections, and generate reports — all from a clean, purpose-built dashboard.
features: Define fee types and schedules (tuition, registration, activity, and more)
Bulk import students via CSV and assign them to fee programs
Record payments manually with receipt generation and balance tracking
Track payment status per student with overdue and partial indicators
Dashboard with summary stats: collected, outstanding, late payment rate
Collections and aging reports exportable to CSV
